name: rescheduleBooking
label: Reschedule a Booking
description: Moves an existing booking to a new date and time.

parameters.name: booking_id
parameters.label: Booking ID
parameters.help: The ID of the booking to reschedule.

parameters.name: new_scheduled_at
parameters.label: New Date & Time
parameters.help: The new date and time for the cleaning.

parameters.name: duration_hours
parameters.label: New Duration (Hours)
parameters.help: Update the duration if needed. Leave blank to keep the current duration.
